image_prompt: A vibrant, cartoonish scene featuring a large, anthropomorphic block of ice wearing tiny sunglasses, sitting on a beach towel under a huge, smiling sun. The ice block is visibly melting, with beads of water comically dripping and forming a small puddle around it, looking a bit resigned but still enjoying the sun. The Portuguese text 'O gelo derrete no sol.' is written in melting, watery letters across the sky or on a beach umbrella. Bright, cheerful colors, summer vibe, Imagen 3.
caption: Algumas coisas são simplesmente... inevitáveis! Tipo o gelo no sol. ☀️ E na sua vida, qual é a 'obviedade' que sempre te faz derreter (de rir, de amor, de cansaço)? Conta pra gente! #DerreteNoSol #Verão #FatosDaNatureza #HumorDiario #CoisasObvias
